planSummary: Manual QA plan for the 3-step identifier-first login flow (password + OTP paths) added in PR #143.
runSummary: Backend: 6 e2e tests written covering request/verify endpoints. Playwright: 2 smoke tests covering password path + OTP navigation. Unit tests: 11/11 passing.

cases.text: Navigate to /login. Enter a valid email in the identifier field. Click متابعة. Verify method step appears with two login options.

cases.summary: Identifier step accepts Saudi phone number
cases.text: Navigate to /login. Enter a valid Saudi phone (e.g. 0501234567). Click متابعة. Verify method step appears.
Navigate to /login. Enter 'notvalid'. Click متابعة. Verify inline error message appears and method step does NOT appear.
Enter admin@deqah-test.com in identifier step, click متابعة. Choose باستخدام كلمة المرور. Fill Admin@1234 in password field. Click تسجيل الدخول. Verify redirect to dashboard and header visible.

cases.summary: Password path — wrong password shows error
cases.text: Enter admin@deqah-test.com, choose password, enter WrongPass. Expect 401 error message to appear without redirect.

cases.summary: OTP path — method step shows OTP option
cases.text: Enter identifier, click متابعة, verify باستخدام رمز تحقق (OTP) button is visible.

cases.summary: Back navigation — method step to identifier step
cases.text: Enter identifier, advance to method step, click رجوع. Verify identifier input reappears.
POST /api/v1/public/auth/otp/request-dashboard with identifier=ghost@nowhere.com. Expect 200 {success:true} regardless of whether user exists.
Seed OTP row with DASHBOARD_LOGIN purpose. POST verify-dashboard with correct code. Expect 200 + accessToken + user.email.
Seed OTP with expiresAt in the past. POST verify-dashboard. Expect 400.
Seed OTP with code 111111. POST verify-dashboard with code 999999. Expect 401.
Seed OTP with consumedAt set. POST verify-dashboard. Expect 400.
Seed OTP with lockedUntil in the future. POST verify-dashboard. Expect 400 + message OTP_LOCKED_OUT.
